description: Governance thresholds for promoting learned signals from shadow -> advisory -> enforce. Phase A ships this as a stable contract; Phases B and C consume it. No phase reads this to mutate routing automatically without passing every gate below.

modes.shadow: Capture only. Events written and validated; zero routing/policy impact. (Phase A)
modes.advisory: Bounded, non-authoritative retrieval hints surfaced at preflight. (Phase B)
modes.enforce: Promoted signals influence routing/policy. Gated by every threshold below. (Phase C)
